focus_anchor: current focus consolidate the operator manual into auto triggered cross runtime skills
why_now: howto's goal-authoring + audit content is reachable only via the hand-maintained `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` pointer, so an operator steering the loop (writing goal.md, classifying shipped proposals) never gets it surfaced on a task match — carving it into an auto-triggered skill closes that discovery gap and retires two more sections from the howto surface being dismantled.
